title: Device Home Screen - Full Support After Launch Date When LM Version Meets or Exceeds Required
scenario: Device home screen shows full support (green connection status dot) when installed LM version meets or exceeds required version after device launch date
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair the headset with the app and ensure the headset is ON and properly connected.
3. Verify the connection status icon on the Home screen shows a green dot.
4. Confirm that the device's launch date has passed and the installed LM (Launch Manager) version meets or exceeds the required version as configured in the product catalogue.
5. Observe the Home screen to verify that full device support is displayed (e.g., all features and settings are available).
expected: The Home screen shows full device support (all features and settings available) and the connection status icon displays a green dot.
